consistency.component_format: Standard format ('V, S, M (a bit of bat fur)')

quality.clarity: High. Description is clear regarding creation, perception, and movement.
quality.completeness: Complete. All standard spell fields are present and populated.
quality.mechanics_linkage: Good linkage. References an existing condition/property ('invisible').

mechanics.core_function: Creates a remote, movable, invisible sensor for vision.
mechanics.action_economy: Standard. Requires 1 action to cast, and the movement action is separate (as an action) which balances its utility.
mechanics.range_vs_movement: Mechanically sound. Range defines initial placement (30 feet), and subsequent movement is limited only by plane and solid barriers (though the description implies the eye can be moved *beyond* the initial 30ft range as long as concentration holds).
mechanics.limitations: Limited by concentration, solid barriers, and plane of existence. Appropriate for a 4th-level utility spell.

suggested_updates: None. The spell entry appears accurate and mechanically sound according to standard 5e conventions.
